texto: All children are heartless. They have not grown a heart yet, which is why they can climb tall trees and say shocking things and leap so very high that grown-up hearts flutter in terror. Hearts weigh quite a lot. That is why it takes so long to grow one.
explicacao: Citação de Valente sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “All children are heartless. They have not grown a heart yet, which is why they can climb tall tre…” articula reflexao, childhood, grown em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
